restaurants.name: Golden Grill Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Relaxed resort-style dining; good variety; well-suited for families and visitors wanting both local and Indian flavours
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

restaurants.name: Vintage Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Friendly service; nice quality, fresh ingredients; many vegetarian options; fairly popular with tourists
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

restaurants.name: The Cuisine Delight
restaurants.ambience: Small Indian restaurant; strong authentic flavours; praised by visitors for large portions and quality of Indian classics
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Bentota River
attractions.description: Exciting watersports including jet skiing, banana boat rides, tube rides or wakeboarding
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Madu River Safari
attractions.description: A gentle boat ride through mangroves, cinnamon plantations, and island temples
attractions.entry_fee: Foreign Visitors: Approximately $25–$35 USD per person for a 1.5–2 hour boat safari
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf
